com.pax.poslink.peripheries

Class POSLinkPrinter

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.peripheries.POSLinkPrinter

  • public class POSLinkPrinter
extends java.lang.Object
    Printer controller This API is for Pax Android devices only, such as E500, A920.
    Add <uses-permission android:name="com.pax.permission.PRINTER"/> in Manifests when turn on Permission Check.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static interface  POSLinkPrinter.CutMode
      Paper cut mode
      static interface  POSLinkPrinter.GreyLevel
      Grey level for print color
      static class  POSLinkPrinter.PrintDataFormatter
      Used to format the string for print(String, PrintListener, boolean...)
      static interface  POSLinkPrinter.PrinterStatus 
      static interface  POSLinkPrinter.PrintListener 
      static interface  POSLinkPrinter.RecommendWidth
      The recommend pixel width for your bitmap in different devices.

    • Field Detail

      • ERROR_CODE_MSG_MAP

        public static final java.util.Map<java.lang.Integer,java.lang.String> ERROR_CODE_MSG_MAP

      • SUPPORT_PRINT_DEVICE_MODEL

        public static final java.util.List<java.lang.String> SUPPORT_PRINT_DEVICE_MODEL
        The names of models that support print. The model name is from android.os.Build.Model

    • Method Detail

      • getInstance

        public static POSLinkPrinter getInstance(Context context)
        Parameters:
        context - app context
        Returns:
        the POSLinkPrinter

      • print

        public void print(java.lang.String formatPrintStr,
                  POSLinkPrinter.PrintListener listener,
                  boolean... isSync)
        Used to print formatted print str. Max length is 4000.
        See SUPPORT_PRINT_DEVICE_MODEL for devices that support print.
        Parameters:
        formatPrintStr - See API Guide for detail. Use POSLinkPrinter.PrintDataFormatter for convenience.
        listener - listen print process.
        isSync - Optional, default is false; true: print sync, false: print async

      • print

        public void print(java.lang.String formatPrintStr,
                  CommSetting commSetting,
                  POSLinkPrinter.PrintListener listener,
                  boolean... isSync)
        Used to print formatted print str. Max length is 4000.
        See SUPPORT_PRINT_DEVICE_MODEL for devices that support print.
        Parameters:
        formatPrintStr - See POSLinkPrinter.PrintDataFormatter for convenience.
        commSetting - Optional. If not null, when the Android device does not support print, it will ask POS to print through ManageRequest with TransType = PRINTER.
        listener - listen print process.
        isSync - Optional, default is false; true: print sync, false: print async

      • print

        public void print(java.lang.String formatPrintStr,
                  int cutMode,
                  POSLinkPrinter.PrintListener listener,
                  boolean... isSync)
        Used to print formatted print str. Max length is 4000.
        Parameters:
        formatPrintStr - See API Guide for detail.
        cutMode - POSLinkPrinter.CutMode The mode for cutting paper.
        listener - listen print process.
        isSync - Optional, default is false; true: print sync, false: print async

      • print

        public void print(java.lang.String formatPrintStr,
                  int cutMode,
                  CommSetting commSetting,
                  POSLinkPrinter.PrintListener listener,
                  boolean... isSync)
        Used to print formatted print str. Max length is 4000.
        Parameters:
        formatPrintStr - See POSLinkPrinter.PrintDataFormatter for convenience.
        cutMode - POSLinkPrinter.CutMode The mode for cutting paper.
        commSetting - Optional. If not null, when the Android device does not support print, it will ask POS to print through ManageRequest with TransType = PRINTER.
        listener - listen print process.
        isSync - Optional, default is false; true: print sync, false: print async

      • setTypeFace

        public void setTypeFace(Typeface typeface)
        Set the typeface of the printed text.
        Parameters:
        typeface -

      • print

        public void print(Bitmap bitmap,
                  POSLinkPrinter.PrintListener listener,
                  boolean... isSync)
        Print the bitmap to paper. For the devices that support cutting paper, they will cut paper default
        Parameters:
        bitmap - The bitmap to print. You can refer to POSLinkPrinter.RecommendWidth for recommend width of your device
        listener - listener for the print process.
        isSync - Optional, default is false; true: print sync, false: print async

      • print

        public void print(Bitmap bitmap,
                  POSLinkPrinter.PrintListener listener,
                  int alignment,
                  boolean... isSync)
        Print the bitmap to paper. For the devices that support cutting paper, they will cut paper default
        Parameters:
        bitmap - The bitmap to print. You can refer to POSLinkPrinter.RecommendWidth for recommend width of your device
        listener - listener for the print process.
        alignment - 0 - left, 1 - center, 2 - right.
        isSync - Optional, default is false; true: print sync, false: print async

      • print

        public void print(Bitmap bitmap,
                  POSLinkPrinter.PrintListener listener)
        Print the bitmap to paper. For the devices that support cutting paper, they will cut paper default
        Parameters:
        bitmap - The bitmap to print. You can refer to POSLinkPrinter.RecommendWidth for recommend width of your device
        listener - listener for the print process.

      • setPrintWidth

        public void setPrintWidth(int printWidth)
        The width of the bitmap when using print(String, int, CommSetting, PrintListener, boolean...). The unit is px. And you can see POSLinkPrinter.RecommendWidth as default.
        Parameters:
        printWidth - the print width in pixel.

      • getRecommendWidth

        public int getRecommendWidth()
        Returns:
        the recommend width.

      • print

        public void print(Bitmap bitmap,
                  int cutMode,
                  POSLinkPrinter.PrintListener listener,
                  int alignment,
                  boolean... isSync)
        Print the bitmap to paper. For the devices that support cutting paper, they will cut paper default
        Parameters:
        bitmap - The bitmap to print. You can refer to POSLinkPrinter.RecommendWidth for recommend width of your device
        cutMode - POSLinkPrinter.CutMode The mode for cutting paper.
        listener - listener for the print process.
        alignment - 0 - left, 1 - center, 2 - right.
        isSync - Optional, default is false; true: print sync, false: print async

      • print

        public void print(Bitmap bitmap,
                  int cutMode,
                  POSLinkPrinter.PrintListener listener,
                  boolean... isSync)
        This is an async method.
        Parameters:
        bitmap - The bitmap to print. You can refer to POSLinkPrinter.RecommendWidth for recommend width of your device
        cutMode - POSLinkPrinter.CutMode The mode for cutting paper.
        listener - listener for the print process.
        isSync - Optional, default is false; true: print sync, false: print async

      • getStatus

        public int getStatus()
        Gets the current print status.
        Returns:
        POSLinkPrinter.PrinterStatus.

        public void setGray(int grey)
        Parameters:
        grey - POSLinkPrinter.GreyLevel

      • cutPaper

        public int cutPaper(int cutMode)
        Parameters:
        cutMode - POSLinkPrinter.CutMode

      • convertSignDataToBitmap

        public static Bitmap convertSignDataToBitmap(java.lang.String data)
        Convert signature data to bitmap
        Parameters:
        data - signature data
        Returns:
        BitMap (return null if the data is not valid)
